title: BOSE SoundLink Flex (2nd Gen) Portable Bluetooth Speaker - Black

description.main: The Bose SoundLink Flex (2nd Gen) throws out surprisingly big, bold sound. Yet it's super-portable, so you can bring the good vibes anywhere. As you'd expect from Bose, you get clear, balanced sound with powerful bass. And you can tweak the audio to your liking with the adjustable EQ in the Bose app. Because it's dust and waterproof, you can bring it along to the beach or pool. It even floats, so no worries if it lands in the deep end.
goodToKnow: With up to 12 hours of battery life, this speaker will keep up with you well into the night
The tough, silicone-wrapped body can withstand drops, crushing, shocks, and rust
Take turns playing DJ – multipoint keeps the speaker paired to different phones at the same time
Pair it with another Bose speaker for bigger sound – choose from Stereo mode or Party mode
PositionIQ technology knows which way up the speaker is orientated and gives you the best sound
Make and take calls – or use your phone's voice assistant - with the built-in microphone
